title: Dreaming of Clock Stopping
description: Seeing a clock stop in a dream may signify that you feel time slipping away or that there's a period of stagnation in your life.

meanings.title: Main Interpretation
meanings.description: From a Freudian perspective, a stopped clock can symbolize a repressed desire or unmet expectations in life. Jung might see it as a sign of stagnation in personal growth.

meanings.title: Subconscious Warning
meanings.description: Your subconscious may be urging you to pay closer attention to time or to make changes in particular areas of your life.

meanings.title: Life Context
meanings.description: This scenario can relate to daily stress or anxiety, potentially stemming from perceived pressure or a halt in progress.

interpretation: Dreaming of a stopped clock might indicate moments in your life where you feel things are at a standstill or blocked. It's a call to reassess yourself and possibly rethink your goals.

context.positive: Making room for a new beginning in your life.
context.negative: Difficulty in progressing and feeling of frustration.
